playerProgram.dataHashBoundary: dataSha256 covers Program account data bytes in [0, dataLength).

programData.dataHashBoundary: dataSha256 covers ProgramData account bytes in [0, dataLength).
programData.hashBoundary: elfAllocationSha256 covers ProgramData bytes in [elfAllocationOffset, dataLength), including allocated trailing bytes.

interpretationBoundaries: This is one confirmed Devnet RPC context. It is not a permanent population total, a finalized-state guarantee, or a Mainnet Beta claim.
Current means expiresAt is strictly greater than the context block time; expired means expiresAt is less than or equal to that chain timestamp.
A canonical PDA and matching stored fields prove internal consistency of public account bytes, not possession of the corresponding session signing secret.
The allowed-actions mask records authorization scope. maxActions and actionCount are reported as stored fields; this snapshot alone does not prove that downstream programs enforce a count limit.
Program and ProgramData hashes bind the deployed account bytes observed at their recorded read contexts. They do not prove reproducible compilation from the current dirty working tree.
Rent values are point-in-time RPC observations. Lamports above the observed exemption minimum are not an application spending budget.
Only referenced profile authorization prefixes are retained; profile names, appearance, equipment, inventory, browser storage, wallet files, and session signing secrets are outside this capture.
Generated teaching artwork is not evidence for these addresses, balances, timestamps, masks, account bytes, or deployment hashes.

reproduction.localCheckScope: Recomputes retained Session hashes, decoding, PDAs, cross-account fields, distributions, and loader metadata. Full ProgramData and profile hashes remain capture-time evidence because those full account bytes are intentionally not retained.
